response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or navigation systems, and his resume emphasizes JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang over the required systems-level languages and distributed geospatial pipelines.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage by NGOs
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and deliver complex systems
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling with measurable impact
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation contexts
Primary language focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required systems languages
Lacks clear evidence of distributed systems or low-latency routing pipeline design
